title: Tutta's Doors
description: It's a mod with doors that I needed for my world.
body:
📖 About:
Tutta's Doors is a personal mod that adds several doors to my world. It introduces five types of doors with designs and functionalities-

🚪New Doors:

◉ Discreet Doors — Feature a fully closed texture, completely hiding the other side. Perfect for those who value privacy and want to keep their interiors concealed.
◉ Normal Doors — Have a semi-open texture with a small window, allowing you to peek through while still maintaining some privacy.
◉ Indiscreet Doors — Designed with a highly open texture, making it easy to see through and providing a more connected feel between spaces.
◉ Transit Doors — Inspired by saloon doors, these allow easy passage with a gentle push, swinging back into place automatically.
◉ Pet Door — Functions like the transit door but is smaller, designed specifically for pets and small mobs.

📦 Beta Version

  • This mod is currently under development, so issues and instabilities may occur. If you'd like to play, keep in mind:
  • Backup your saves often;
  • Make sure everything is working before adding it to a modpack;
  • Report any issues you find to our Github!! It helps us a lot!
  • If you want to support me you can donate in my KO-FI :D

📝 FAQ:

  • Can I use this mod in my modpack?
      Yeah! you can use this mod in your modpack, but please use modrinth and do not rehost the files.

  • Will this mod eventually be ported to Fabric/other loaders?
      No, unfortunately not. This mod will only be maintained for NeoForge, unless someone else wishes to port it. (please contact us first)

  • Will there be a backport to older Minecraft versions?
      No, at the moment there are no plans for backporting this mod to previous versions.
